meaning: Those who (refers to people being talked about)
their deeds (referring to الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ - those who disbelieved)
and they believed/had faith (connected to عَمِلُوا in the ayah)
with what (connects to نُزِّلَ - was sent down)
from them (referring to those who believed in كَفَّرَ عَنْهُمْ)
their Lord (from مِن رَّبِّهِمْ - from their Lord)
their examples (referring to those who disbelieved)
then/so when (connects to لَقِيتُمُ - you meet)
you all met face-to-face (referring to the believers meeting those who disbelieved)
then bind tightly! (command to many people)
as a free gift/favor (describing how something is done)
she puts down (until الْحَرْبُ does this)
the war (subject of تَضَعَ - puts down)
its burdens (referring to الْحَرْبُ - the war)
that (pointing to what was mentioned before)
and even if (connecting to previous statement)
he would have gained victory for himself (hypothetical in لَوْ clause)
some of you (as object of لِّيَبْلُوَا۟ - so that He may test)
with some (object of يَبْلُوَا - to test)
their state/condition (object of يُصْلِحُ - he will improve)
and he makes them enter (the object is ٱلْجَنَّةَ)
Paradise (as the object of يُدْخِلُهُمُ - He will admit them)
he made it known (referring to Paradise in previous ayah)
for/to them (referring to those who believe in this ayah)
those who (plural, referring to believers in ءَامَنُوٓا۟)
Allah (the one true God who is being disobeyed)
he helps you all (if you help اللَّهَ)
and he makes firm (connected to يَنصُرْكُمْ - he helps you)
so [may there be] complete ruin (for them)
surely for them (referring to الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ - those who disbelieved)
and he made (someone) lose the way (acted on أَعْمٰلَهُمْ)
their deeds (referring to those who disbelieved in أَعْمٰلَهُمْ)
that (pointing to something far) (refers to what follows in بِأَنَّهُمْ)
because they (subject of كَرِهُوا - they disliked)
and so he made (something) fail/worthless (acted on أَعْمٰلَهُمْ)
their deeds (object of فَأَحْبَطَ - so He nullified)
so they may look (connected to يَسِيرُوا۟ - they travel)
and for the rejecters of faith
similar things to it, its likes
that (pointing to something far) (refers to what follows in بِأَنَّ)
because (connects this fact to اللَّهَ مَوْلَى)
one who is protected/supported (in this ayah: showing the disbelievers have no protector)
and that (connects this fact to the previous statement)
for them (refers to الْكٰفِرِينَ - the disbelievers)
he causes to enter (Allah causes the believers to enter Paradise)
and they did good deeds (connected to ءَامَنُوا۟ - believed)
the righteous ones (feminine plural) (object of عَمِلُوا)
it flows (referring to الْأَنْهٰرُ - the rivers)
they disbelieved (subject of يَتَمَتَّعُونَ - they enjoy)
and they eat/are eating (refers to ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ - those who disbelieve)
just as, like what (compares to يَأْكُلُونَ - they eat)
a dwelling place (where the disbelievers will stay)
a strength/power (as object of أَشَدُّ - stronger)
your town (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
the one which (feminine) (describes قَرْيَتِكَ - your town)
any helper (object of لَا in لَا نَاصِرَ)
upon clear evidence (from رَبِّهِ - his Lord)
it was made attractive (subject of سُوٓءُ)
the garden, paradise (the one promised to the righteous)
the God-fearing ones (who were promised Paradise)
it changes/becomes different (referring to طَعْمُهُۥ - its taste)
from/of (shows rivers of wine in this ayah)
and for them (connecting to the previous descriptions of Paradise)
he/it (referring to كَمَنْ - like one who)
water (as the object being acted upon)
scalding hot water (being given to drink)
and then he cut into many pieces (their intestines)
and from them (referring to those who listen to you)
when (referring to something that will happen in the future)
near/with you (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
they said (referring to the disbelievers who left from being with the Prophet ﷺ)
for those who (connected to قَالُوا۟ - they said)
they were given (those who have ٱلْعِلْمَ/knowledge)
just now (describing قَالَ - what he said)
he sealed (subject of a sentence with قُلُوب as object)
their desires (referring to those who left the Prophet's gathering)
he increased them (referring to هُدًى guidance)
a guidance (that increases for الَّذِينَ ٱهْتَدَوْا۟/those who seek it)
Then do/So do (asks what happens next)
they look/watch (referring to the disbelievers in context)
the Hour (referring to the Day of Judgment)
that (introduces the clause تَأْتِيَهُم - it comes to them)
that she/it (feminine) comes to them suddenly (object of أَن)
suddenly (describing how تَأْتِيَهُم/it comes to them)
then certainly/so indeed (connects to يَنظُرُونَ - they await)
its signs (subject of جَآءَ - has come)
then how/so how (questioning their benefit from ذِكْرَىٰهُمْ)
so know! (connecting to what follows: أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ)
and seek forgiveness! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
and Allah (the One True God) (subject of يَعْلَمُ)
your place/state of moving about (object of يَعْلَمُ - He knows)
and he says (connected to what comes before)
why not (expressing desire for something to happen)
it (feminine) was sent down repeatedly (referring to سُورَةٌ/chapter)
it (feminine) was sent down (referring to سُورَةٌ/chapter)
a chapter (subject of نُزِّلَتْ - was sent down)
the fighting (mentioned in this verse about war)
their hearts (referring to those who have disease in their hearts)
a disease (in the hearts of hypocrites)
they look/are looking (at إِلَيْكَ - at you)
he looked (like يَنظُرُونَ in this ayah)
the one completely overwhelmed (in the look of one who faints from death)
upon him (connected to المَغْشِيِّ - the one who faints)
and then when (connects to عَزَمَ - was determined)
he decided firmly (subject of the condition in فَإِذَا...فَلَوْ)
Allah (as the object being referred to)
better/good (for them) (object of لَكَانَ - it would have been)
So, then + is/are? (Used to ask questions that expect a yes/no answer)
that (connects to تُفْسِدُوا۟ - you spread corruption)
you all cause corruption (connected to أَن)
those (pointing to people far away) (subject of لَعَنَهُمُ)
so He made them deaf (Allah made them deaf as a result of their actions)
the Quran (object of يَتَدَبَّرُونَ - they reflect upon)
Those who - connects descriptions to people/things
to/for them (subject of سَوَّلَ - made fair-seeming)
he made something seem very attractive (subject: الشَّيْطٰنُ)
to/for them (referring to those who turned back in disbelief)
because they (said to those who hated what Allah revealed)
he sent down repeatedly (subject of Allah)
in (connects بَعْضِ with what comes before it)
their secrets (object of يَعْلَمُ - He knows)
so how? (introduces a question about the consequences described in إِذَا تَوَفَّتْهُمُ)
she (the angels) took them completely (subject of يَضْرِبُونَ)
they (males) are striking (وُجُوهَهُمْ وَأَدْبٰرَهُمْ - their faces and their backs)
and their backs (being struck by يَضْرِبُونَ)
Allah (as the object of أَسْخَطَ - angered)
so he made (something) invalid (acted on أَعْمٰلَهُمْ)
their deeds (object of فَأَحْبَطَ - so He nullified)
he makes (something) exit (that Allah will expose أَضْغٰنَهُمْ)
surely We will show them to you
then surely you would have recognized them
by their marks/signs (used to identify المنافقين - the hypocrites)
and you will surely recognize them
in (connects لَحْنِ to what comes before it)
And Allah (as the doer of يَعْلَمُ - knows)
your (all of you) deeds (object of يَعْلَمُ - knows)
and we will most certainly test you all
until, so that (connects to نَعْلَمَ - we know)
and the patient ones (object of نَعْلَمَ - we know)
your news (referring to the news/information of those being tested in وَلَنَبْلُوَنَّكُمْ)
and they blocked forcefully (connected to كَفَرُوا۟)
the messenger (object of وَشَآقُّوا۟ - they opposed)
that which (connects تَبَيَّنَ with what came before)
for them (connected to ٱلْهُدَىٰ - the guidance)
Allah (as the object being acted upon)
and he will nullify (the deeds in أَعْمٰلَهُمْ)
their deeds (referring to those who disbelieved and hindered from Allah's path)
Allah (as the object of أَطِيعُوا۟ - obey)
and all of you obey! (connected to أَطِيعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ)
your (all of you) deeds (object of تُبْطِلُوٓا۟)
indeed/truly (emphasizes the statement about الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟)
they disbelieved (subject of وَصَدُّوا۟ - and they hindered)
and they strongly turned away/prevented (from سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ)
away from (blocking people away from سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ)
of Allah (object of يَغْفِرَ - will forgive)
Allah (as the subject of يَغْفِرَ - will forgive)
for them/to them (referring to كُفَّارٌ - the disbelievers)
and you all call (connected to تَهِنُوا۟)
and never/and will not (negates يَتِرَكُمْ - will deprive you)
he will decrease you all (object of وَلَن)
he gives you all (your rewards - أُجُورَكُمْ)
he asks you all for it
and then he welcomes you all
so that you all may spend
he withholds/is withholding (something that should be given)
he is/becomes stingy (in response to مَن - whoever)
The Self-Sufficient One (a name of اللَّهِ)
like you all (object of يَسْتَبْدِلْ - he will replace)
